why_current_misses: 缺少登录态浏览器采集器和 trace/HAR 资产账本
possible_severe_vulnerability: 账号接管入口、hidden API、token refresh abuse
acceptance: role-login replay 输出 HAR、trace、chunk hash、manifest

missed_asset: 管理员角色才加载的 chunk
why_current_misses: 缺少 admin/user role diff replay
possible_severe_vulnerability: admin endpoint 越权、退款/封禁接口滥用
acceptance: admin 与普通用户 chunk diff 产生 endpoint 差异证据

why_current_misses: 缺少 tenant A/B runtime diff
possible_severe_vulnerability: tenant-only API、BOLA、跨租户数据读取
acceptance: 至少两个租户 replay 输出 chunk/API 差异

why_current_misses: 缺少 feature flag forced route discovery
possible_severe_vulnerability: 灰度 admin/internal endpoint、隐藏业务流
acceptance: feature flag 组合触发 chunk 并记录来源

why_current_misses: 缺少旧构建 sourcemap 枚举和 freshness gate
possible_severe_vulnerability: 源码、secret、hidden API 泄露
acceptance: 发现旧 map 并还原 sourcesContent/path

why_current_misses: 缺少 CDN stale asset resurrection 检查
possible_severe_vulnerability: 旧漏洞代码、已下线 endpoint、secret 残留
acceptance: 同 asset 多版本 hash 差异和历史 URL 证据

why_current_misses: 缺少 SW/Cache Storage runtime dump
possible_severe_vulnerability: 持久 XSS、旧 API、cache poisoning
acceptance: 导出 Cache Storage 资产账本

why_current_misses: 缺少 _next/build-manifest 与 app-build-manifest 解析
possible_severe_vulnerability: 未发现页面 chunk、server action/RSC 边界线索
acceptance: 解析 pages/app route 到 chunk 映射

why_current_misses: 缺少 manifest.json/modulepreload 解析
possible_severe_vulnerability: 动态 import endpoint、env 泄露
acceptance: 解析 entry/imports/dynamicImports/css/assets

why_current_misses: 缺少 webpack runtime module id/chunk graph 解析
possible_severe_vulnerability: 隐藏模块、异步路由、admin route
acceptance: 还原 chunk id → URL → module 关系

why_current_misses: 缺少 persisted query hash discovery
possible_severe_vulnerability: hidden mutation、IDOR、tenant bypass
acceptance: 提取 hash/query/mutation/variables 证据

why_current_misses: 缺少 WS message capture/schema inference
possible_severe_vulnerability: 跨用户消息读取、租户越权
acceptance: 捕获消息 schema、auth header、tenant id

why_current_misses: 缺少 Electron ASAR/preload/ipc 枚举
possible_severe_vulnerability: preload bridge RCE、任意文件读写
acceptance: 提取 preload、contextBridge、ipcRenderer 调用

why_current_misses: 缺少 extension manifest/content/background 采集
possible_severe_vulnerability: 权限提升、token leak、externally_connectable abuse
acceptance: 解析 manifest/content scripts/host_permissions

why_current_misses: 缺少 WebView bridge 名称和 native bridge 调用收集
possible_severe_vulnerability: 移动端账号接管、任意调用 native 方法
acceptance: 发现 window.* bridge、JSInterface、schema

why_current_misses: 缺少 wasm/js glue 和 imports/exports 解析
possible_severe_vulnerability: unsafe parser、边界逻辑缺陷、文件处理漏洞线索
acceptance: 输出 wasm import/export、glue sink、调用点

why_current_misses: 缺少 iframe src 与 postMessage runtime 采集
possible_severe_vulnerability: token leak、origin bypass、account takeover
acceptance: 记录 origin/source/data schema/sink

missed_asset: 支付/退款/优惠券业务 JS
why_current_misses: 缺少业务域 chunk 标记和敏感流量 replay
possible_severe_vulnerability: 前端价格控制、退款滥用、优惠券逻辑绕过
acceptance: 敏感业务入口触发 chunk 和 API diff

why_current_misses: 缺少 preview/editor/markdown renderer 资产聚类
possible_severe_vulnerability: stored DOM XSS、mXSS、SVG/PDF preview XSS
acceptance: 提取 renderer、sanitizer、preview sink

why_current_misses: 缺少浏览器 storage dump 与差异分析
possible_severe_vulnerability: JWT/PII/tenant cache 泄露、跨标签 token leak
acceptance: 导出 local/session/IndexedDB/CacheStorage 证据
